title: Converting between metric units of length

steps.instruction: Convert kilometres to metres by multiplying by $1000$.
Convert metres to centimetres by multiplying by $100$.

title: Converting between units of volume and capacity
problem: A fish tank has a volume of $48\,000$ cm³. Express this volume in litres and in kilolitres.

steps.instruction: Convert cm³ to mL using the fact that $1$ cm³ $= 1$ mL.
Convert mL to L by dividing by $1000$.
Convert L to kL by dividing by $1000$.

title: Multi-step conversion — volume in litres
problem: A rectangular garden bed is $240$ cm long, $120$ cm wide and $25$ cm deep. Find the volume of soil needed in litres.

steps.instruction: Calculate the volume of the garden bed in cm³.
Convert cm³ to mL using $1$ cm³ $= 1$ mL.
Convert mL to L by dividing by $1000$.
